name: AMULET

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: F0CEAF46-4821-4718-80ED-44DB7BD22711

comment:
3 x portman haloLED™
• 3x 40W
• true tungsten emulation
• smooth dimming
• warm on lower values
• bright and blinding on higher values4

6 x RGBW strips
• 6x 8W
• saturated colours
• smooth dimming and colour mixing
• separate control

Hi-class electronics
• 6 DMX modes
• Colour Feedback System™
• RDM
• Art-Net in
• W-DMX option
• macros
• power through

Quick Joint System™
• connect fixtures together
• click-click, no-screws system
• solid connection
• perfect shapes
Auto Orientation™
• automatic channel order when the orientation of the fixture changes
• fixture knows where is its TOP and RIGHT side
